reviews.review_description:
I own this title on Xbox, and switch. I have played alot of this game. It feels like old school 90s game, and plays very well in VR. 
     Problems I’m having lie with snap turn. This game needs smooth turning. 
      Also this title was around $20 on other consoles, and only $6 on here. Whats missing? so far I haven’t figured it out yet.

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for the kind words! We haven’t cut any content from the original game and we even improved some to match the VR experience!
